title: Refactor DIP-001 (DIP): Gson directly instantiates internal implementation details.

detected_issue.description: Gson directly instantiates internal implementation details.
detected_issue.reasoning: The high-level Gson facade directly instantiates ConstructorConstructor and JsonAdapterAnnotationTypeAdapterFactory using the 'new' keyword. This couples the high-level module to specific low-level implementation details rather than depending on abstractions or receiving these components via dependency injection.

fix_logic.summary: Refactor Gson constructor to use dependency injection for internal components
fix_logic.rationale: The Gson class was directly instantiating ConstructorConstructor and JsonAdapterAnnotationTypeAdapterFactory. By moving this instantiation logic to the GsonBuilder (which is the factory for Gson), we decouple Gson from these specific implementations, adhering to the Dependency Inversion Principle.
